changes: starts the lucky wheel animation immediately while the secure result is processed in the background
moves wheel accounting from a full-database transaction to small user and game-treasury transactions
caches wheel configuration briefly without caching financial balances
warms the exchange transaction state and removes repeated full preflight reads on consecutive orders
caches public market snapshots briefly and reduces heavy trade-history queries
refreshes exchange panels in the background instead of blocking the order button
keeps V218 authoritative draw scheduling unchanged
